elements.name: Open a settings section and return to home

steps.name: the Settings app should be displayed
the user taps on "About phone"
the user should see the "About phone" section
the user navigates back
the Settings app should be displayed

name: Android Settings App
description:
As a QA engineer
  I want to open the Android Settings application
  So that I can verify the app launches correctly and key sections are visible
